compounddef.basecompoundref: MR::MultiListener< MouseDownListener, MouseMoveListener, MouseUpListener, PreDrawListener, PostDrawListener >

briefdescription.para: object moves along an axis
object inflates or deflates along an axis depending on drag direction (away from center or toward center respectively)
object inflates or deflates along all axes depending on drag direction (away from center or toward center respectively)
Transform operation applying to object while dragging an axis. This parameter does not apply to active operation.
main object that holds all other controls

detaileddescription.para: Initial box diagonal vector (before transformation), it is needed to correctly convert non-uniform scaling to uniform one and apply it to this widget

briefdescription.para: same as controlsRoot_->xf() but with non uniform scaling applied
this is needed for tooltip only
if controlsRoot_ xf changed without approve, user modification stops

memberdef.argsstring: (const Box3f &box, const AffineXf3f &xf, std::shared_ptr< ITransformControls > controls={})
memberdef.name: create

detaileddescription.para: Creates transform widget around given box and applies given xf subscribes to viewer events controls: class that is responsible for visualization if controls is empty default TransformControls is used
Removes widget from scene and clears all widget objects unsubscribes from viewer events

briefdescription.para: Returns current transform mode mask.
Sets transform mode mask (enabling or disabling corresponding widget controls)
Returns current axis transform mode (translate/scale object while dragging an axis)
Sets current axis transform mode (translate/scale object while dragging an axis)
Returns root object of widget.
Returns controls object, that visualize widget.

detaileddescription.para: Changes controls xf (controls will affect object in basis of new xf) note that rotation is applied around 0 coordinate in world space, so use xfAround to process rotation around user defined center non-uniform scale will be converted to uniform one based on initial box diagonal
Subscribes to object visibility, and behave like its child if obj argument is null, stop following

briefdescription.para: Sets callback that will be called in draw function during scaling with current scale arg.
Sets callback that will be called in draw function during translation with current shift arg.
Sets callback that will be called in draw function during rotation with current angle in rad.
Sets callback that will be called when modification of widget stops.
Sets callback that will be called when modification of widget starts.
Sets callback that will be called when widget gets additive transform.

detaileddescription.para: Sets callback that will be called when widget gets additive transform The callback should return true to approve transform and false to reject it

briefdescription.para: undiformAddXf - for ActiveEditMode::ScalingMode only, to scale widget uniformly

detaileddescription.para: Visual widget to modify transform present in scene (ancillary), subscribes to viewer events

node.label: MR::MultiListener< MouseDownListener, MouseMoveListener, MouseUpListener, PreDrawListener, PostDrawListener >
MR::MultiListener< MouseDownListener, MouseMoveListener, MouseUpListener, PreDrawListener, PostDrawListener >
